_comment: Registry of the public data sources behind this dashboard, rendered on the Data sources page. Per-source automation status and last-run results live in update_status.json.
update_method: Monthly GitHub Actions pipeline (scripts/update_data.py) for World Bank, IMF, WGI and UNDP HDR; manual for OEC-derived values; optional UN Comtrade with a free key.

wb_wdi.name: World Bank — World Development Indicators
wb_wdi.used_for: GNI per capita (Atlas), GDP per capita, GDP growth, inflation, population, remittances, poverty headcount, Gini index, unemployment, life expectancy, income group classification.
wb_wdi.pipeline_note: Automated: refreshed by the monthly pipeline via the keyless World Bank API.

imf_weo.name: IMF — World Economic Outlook database
imf_weo.api: IMF Data (public); WEO downloads are freely available.
imf_weo.used_for: General government gross debt, fiscal balance, current account balance, reserve adequacy, interest burden.
imf_weo.license: Free for public use with attribution
imf_weo.pipeline_note: Automated for debt, fiscal balance and current account via the keyless IMF DataMapper API (recent WEO points may be IMF staff estimates). Reserves import-cover and interest-to-revenue remain manual — see the Data status page for why.

undp_hdr.name: UNDP — Human Development Report data center
undp_hdr.used_for: Human Development Index, expected years of schooling.
undp_hdr.pipeline_note: Semi-automated: the pipeline parses UNDP’s complete-time-series CSV; the CSV link is pinned per HDR edition and needs a one-line update when a new report is released.

oec.name: Observatory of Economic Complexity (OEC) / Atlas of Economic Complexity
oec.api: Public country profiles; bulk API requires registration.
oec.used_for: Top export products, top export destinations, export concentration, Economic Complexity Index.
oec.license: Public profiles free to view; check terms before redistribution
oec.pipeline_note: Partial/manual: OEC bulk access now requires a registered token, so export structure and ECI values remain hand-transcribed and are labeled manual_approx.

wb_wgi.name: World Bank — Worldwide Governance Indicators
wb_wgi.used_for: Government effectiveness and rule of law percentile ranks (governance pillar).
wb_wgi.pipeline_note: Automated: WGI percentile ranks are fetched through the World Bank API. WGI are perceptions-based composite indicators and are themselves debated; treat this pillar as indicative.

un_comtrade.name: UN Comtrade (planned, not used in prototype)
un_comtrade.api: Free tier requires registration and has rate limits.
un_comtrade.used_for: Planned future source for detailed bilateral trade flows. Not used in the MVP to keep the site fully static and key-free.
un_comtrade.pipeline_note: Optional: with a free registered COMTRADE_API_KEY, the pipeline computes real top exports, destinations and concentration (HHI). The site never depends on it.
